# Marker Data

> Marker Data allows users to extract, convert & create databases from Final Cut Pro’s marker metadata.

- [Additional Credits](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/additional-credits.md): Marker Data is also made possible because of the hard work of these amazing open-source projects and libraries. ❤️
- [Disclaimers](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/disclaimers.md): The author(s) have no affiliation with Apple, Notion, Airtable, Dropbox, Microsoft, or Adobe in any capacity. All product names, logos, and brands are property of their respective owners.
- [Marker Data License Agreement](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/license.md): MIT License
- [Marker Data](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/readme.md): Marker Data
- [Prologue](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/prologue.md): TARS translated quantum gravitational data into Morse code for Cooper to transmit from Gargantua's tesseract to Murph's watch on Earth.Similarly, Marker Data streamlines the translation and transmission of Final Cut Pro's Marker metadata to databases effortlessly.
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/faq.md): Marker Data facilitates extraction from any conceivable timeline such as Projects and Compound Clips.
- [Troubleshooting](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/troubleshooting.md): Below, you will find a comprehensive list of common issues users may encounter, accompanied by solutions to resolve them.
- [Press Kit & Media](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/press-kit-media.md): We would greatly appreciate your support in sharing and promoting Marker Data!
- [Epilogue](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/epilogue.md): Cooper and TARS embarks on a new journey.
- [Release Notes](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/release-notes.md): 🎉 Released:
- [The Acharya](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/the-acharya.md): The Acharya is an independent production company based in Singapore founded by Vigneswaran Rajkumar. Its current relentless pursuit is to develop and produce feature films for a distinctive global audience.
- [Credits](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/credits.md): Original Idea, Application Direction and Workflow Architecture by Vigneswaran Rajkumar

## Case Study

- [Final Cut Pro's Enigma](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/case-study/final-cut-pro-enigma.md): Final Cut Pro stands out as a radically different NLE primarily because of its exclusive optimisation for the macOS ecosystem, leveraging seamless integration with Apple hardware and software.
- [Creating VFX Database](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/case-study/creating-vfx-database.md): Josh Beal provides a compelling analysis, drawing a noteworthy comparison between the workflows of two prominent video editing platforms, namely Media Composer and Final Cut Pro, particularly in the context of VFX database creation.
- [Reviving A Lost Feature](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/case-study/reviving-a-lost-feature.md): Those of us who have been in the industry long enough would recall Legacy Final Cut Pro 7. It was a professional video editing software developed by Apple. Final Cut Pro 7 was highly popular and widely used in the film and television industry for its advanced features and powerful tools.
- [Personal Shot library](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/case-study/personal-shot-library.md): ShotDeck stands as a collaborative digital library of cinematic imagery created by the esteemed cinematographer, Lawrence Sher. This library boasts a comprehensive search functionality, facilitated by the meticulous tagging of each image with over 50 discerning keywords.

## User Guide

- [Overview](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/user-guide/overview.md): Marker Data has been meticulously crafted with a focus on simplicity, ensuring that users can effortlessly execute tasks and operations with minimal interaction.
- [Extract](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/user-guide/extract.md): Extract Window
- [Queue](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/user-guide/queue.md): Queue Window
- [General Settings](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/user-guide/general.md): General Settings
- [Image Settings](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/user-guide/image.md): Image Settings
- [Label Settings](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/user-guide/label.md): Label Settings
- [Configuration Settings](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/user-guide/configurations.md): Configuration Settings
- [Database Settings](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/user-guide/databases.md): Database Settings
- [Pagemaker](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/user-guide/pagemaker.md): Pagemaker
- [Share Destination](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/user-guide/share-destination.md): Share Destination
- [Workflow Extension](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/user-guide/workflow-extension.md): Workflow Extension - Extract
- [Keyboard Shortcuts](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/user-guide/keyboard-shortcuts.md): You can use keyboard shortcuts to quickly accomplish Common tasks in Marker Data. To use a keyboard shortcut, press all the keys in the shortcut at the same time.

## Databases

- [Database Platforms](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/databases/database-platforms.md): Notion is a single space where you can think, write, and plan. Capture thoughts, manage projects, or even run an entire company — and do it exactly the way you want.
- [Notion Prerequisite](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/databases/notion-prerequisite.md): Workspace Name
- [Airtable Prerequisite](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/databases/airtable-prerequisite.md): Login to your Airtable account via a web browser.
- [Dropbox Prerequisite](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/databases/dropbox-prerequisite.md): Airtable's API does not allow direct uploading of attachments. In order to upload an attachment via Airtable's API, the attachment must first exist at a publicly accessible url.

## In Action

- [Sending to Notion](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/in-action/notion-profile.md): Create Your Notion Database Profile.
- [Sending to Airtable](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/in-action/airtable-profile.md): Create Your Airtable Database Profile.
- [Sending to Logic Pro](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/in-action/midi-profile.md): Create Configuration for MIDI
- [Sending to Excel](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/in-action/excel-profile.md): Create Configuration for Excel
- [Creating YouTube Chapters Markers](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/in-action/creating-youtube-chapters.md): Create Configuration for MIDI
- [Creating Shot Library](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/in-action/creating-shot-library.md): Create Your Notion Database Profile.
- [Creating PDF](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/in-action/creating-pdf.md): Create Your Notion Database Profile or Airtable Database Profile.
- [Generating Markers](https://markerdata.theacharya.co/in-action/generating-markers.md): Users interested in procedural Marker extraction can take advantage of the Marker Toolbox, which offers capabilities for inserting and manipulating
